name: Potatoes with Lemon, Thyme and Wax Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds new potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubes
freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the thin-skinned small (waxy) potatoes and cut into 4ths and 6ths.
2. Steam in a cooker with the thyme sprigs, minced lemon zest, and pepper.
3. Steam for about 15 to 18 minutes.
4. Add the wax beans and steam an additional 7 to 10 minutes.
5. Salt to taste and serve hot.
